name: Qatari Arabic
notes: Qatari Arabic. Tribal/Bedouin character somewhat stronger than Kuwaiti. k → /tʃ/ before front vowels (Gulf feature). ث, ذ preserved more consistently by older/conservative speakers. ق → /ɡ/ (Bedouin/traditional). Vowel imāla prominent.

sources.author: Watson, J.C.E.
sources.title: The Phonology and Morphology of Arabic

sources.author: Holes, C.
sources.title: Modern Arabic: Structures, Functions, and Varieties
